---
id: execute-a-saved-query
title: "Execute a saved query"
description: "Execute a saved query by its ID. Optionally pass parameters and force re-execution."
sidebar_label: "Execute a saved query"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

hide_send_button: true
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Execute a saved query"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/queries/{queryId}/execute"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Execute a saved query by its ID. Optionally pass parameters and force re-execution.
